title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
author: Molly McHugh-Johnson Contributor
raw_description: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
summary: 谷歌AI专家解释全栈AI方法，强调其在AI工作中的基础地位，涵盖从硬件到应用层的全面优化。
analysis_note: 内容为概念解释，非技术突破，相关性一般，适合科普而非深度技术分析。
